title: Anchor channel method
text: Anchor channels align code, notes, and memory around shared retrieval concepts and synthesis goals.

title: Residual compression method
text: Residual channels preserve compressed implementation detail after anchor alignment for retrieval.

title: Export neutral knowledge pack
text: Export CAM memory into a neutral knowledge pack so Forge can ingest it without runtime coupling.

title: Benchmark retrieval lift
text: Measure whether the forge vector improves retrieval hit rate over the base embedding baseline.
